problems.cause: AGREE annex references Actual_Speed, but validator detects a type mismatch from subcomponent port THROT.Actual; this implies the annex is being evaluated in a context where subcomponent port visibility is incorrectly assumed.

executor_steps: Remove all references to subcomponent ports (THROT.Actual, CNTRL.Target, SM.State_Out) from the AGREE annex — they are not visible at the component type level.
Retain only the five visible component-level ports: Target_Speed, Actual_Speed, Target_Tire_Pitch, Actual_Tire_Pitch, State_Signal.
Keep the existing assume and guarantee clauses, as they use only visible ports and are logically valid.
Confirm that no new identifiers, types, or package qualifiers are introduced.
